payload.description: Staff summary document describing schedule changes on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines effective March 30, 2025, including service improvements, holiday schedules, and special schedules for Yankee Stadium events.

tool_args.label: March 30, 2025 Schedule Change
tool_args.raw_text: Schedules will change on the Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines effective Sunday, March 30, 2025.

payload.description: Schedules change on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines effective March 30, 2025, including service improvements, support for major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects.

tool_args.label: Memorial Day Weekend 2025 Getaway Service
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will operate a getaway day on Friday, May 23, 2025 with 2 additional Trains on the Hudson Line... 2 additional Harlem Line Trains... and 3 additional Trains [on the New Haven Line]... Metro-North will operate a Sunday Service on Memorial Day, May 26, 2025.

payload.date_text: Friday, May 23, 2025 (getaway day); Memorial Day, May 26, 2025
payload.description: Metro-North operates getaway day with additional trains on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines on May 23, and Sunday Service on Memorial Day, May 26.

date_text_normalized.raw_text: Friday, May 23, 2025 (getaway day); Memorial Day, May 26, 2025

tool_args.label: July 4th Weekend 2025 Getaway Service
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will operate a getaway day on Thursday, July 3, 2025, with 2 additional Trains on the Hudson Line... 2 additional Harlem Line Trains... and 3 additional Trains [on the New Haven Line]. In addition, Metro-North will operate a normal Sunday Service schedule on 4th of July.

payload.description: Metro-North operates getaway day with additional trains on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines on July 3, and Sunday Service on July 4.

tool_args.label: Labor Day Weekend 2025 Getaway Service
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will operate a getaway day on Friday, August 29, 2025 with 2 additional Trains on the Hudson Line... 2 additional Harlem Line Trains... and 3 additional Trains [on the New Haven Line]. Metro-North will operate a Sunday Service on Labor Day, September 1, 2025.

payload.date_text: Friday, August 29, 2025 (getaway day); Labor Day, September 1, 2025
payload.description: Metro-North operates getaway day with additional trains on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven lines on August 29, and Sunday Service on Labor Day, September 1.

date_text_normalized.raw_text: Friday, August 29, 2025 (getaway day); Labor Day, September 1, 2025

tool_args.label: New York Yankees Special Schedules 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The NY Yankees will have its first official game at Yankee Stadium on Thursday, March 27, 2025, prior to the release of the New Schedule. Metro-North will provide an operating schedule order to ensure service to and from Yankee Stadium. Following the release of the March 30, 2025 schedule, Metro-North will have Yankee Stadium service for every MLB, MLS and Concert events held at Yankee Stadium.

payload.description: Metro-North provides Yankee Stadium service for MLB, MLS and concert events at Yankee Stadium. First game March 27, 2025, before new schedule release, with an operating schedule order.

tool_args.label: Schedule supports major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects
tool_args.raw_text: The March 30, 2025, Schedules continue to support major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects that require extensive track outages on all three lines including Switch replacements, Track and Tie renewals, the continuation of Park Avenue Viaduct Span renewal and Walk Bridge replacement.

payload.claim_text: The March 30, 2025, Schedules continue to support major C&D, CDOT and Maintenance of Way projects that require extensive track outages on all three lines including Switch replacements, Track and Tie renewals, the continuation of Park Avenue Viaduct Span renewal and Walk Bridge replacement.
payload.subject: March 30, 2025 Schedules

tool_args.label: Harlem Line added weeknight trains for service standards
tool_args.raw_text: In compliance with MTA service Standards the following weeknight Trains have been added to the Harlem Line for increased services: Train 589 – Service to North White Plains Station, scheduled to depart GCT at 9:53 PM; Train 593 – Service to North White Plains Station, scheduled to depart GCT at 10:55 PM.

payload.claim_text: Weeknight Trains added to Harlem Line: Train 589 to North White Plains departing GCT at 9:53 PM, Train 593 to North White Plains departing GCT at 10:55 PM.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Harlem Line GCT departure time adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: In addition to maintaining MTA Service Standards on the Harlem Line, the following Trains departure times from GCT have been adjusted: Train 687 departs GCT 9:50 PM (2 min earlier), Train 591 departs GCT 10:25 PM (6 min earlier), Train 691 departs GCT 10:52 PM (9 min earlier), Train 595 departs GCT 11:19 PM (25 min earlier), Train 695 departs GCT 12:01 AM (9 min earlier), Train 597 departs GCT 12:19 AM (9 min earlier), Train 697 departs GCT 12:55 AM (9 min earlier).

payload.claim_text: Harlem Line departure times from GCT adjusted earlier: 687 (9:50 PM, -2 min), 591 (10:25 PM, -6 min), 691 (10:52 PM, -9 min), 595 (11:19 PM, -25 min), 695 (12:01 AM, -9 min), 597 (12:19 AM, -9 min), 697 (12:55 AM, -9 min).
